# Example Bakery

> Family bakery in Springfield: sourdough bread, croissants and custom cakes, baked fresh every morning, open Tuesday to Sunday.

## Pages

- [Home]({{ORIGIN}}/): products, opening hours and how to order
- [About us]({{ORIGIN}}/about.html): our story since 1998
- [Sourdough bread]({{ORIGIN}}/#sourdough): our signature slow-rise loaves
- [Croissants and pastries]({{ORIGIN}}/#pastries): hand-rolled fresh every morning
- [Custom cakes]({{ORIGIN}}/#cakes): birthdays and weddings, baked to order
- [Visit and contact]({{ORIGIN}}/#visit): address, opening hours and phone number
